message:
fix: add explicit u64 suffixes to integer literals in onboarding scorecard

Add _u64 type suffixes to integer literals in build_onboarding_scorecard
(e.g., 120_000 -> 120_000_u64) to resolve clippy ambiguous integer type
inference warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
